title: Implement Wave 37 manager provider directory scorecard UI
description: Add manager provider directory and provider profile screens, wire them into the manager app, and render additive provider scorecard metadata without breaking dashboard or handoff flows.
acceptance_criteria: Manager app exposes a provider directory screen with manager-safe filters and list rows
Provider profile screen renders additive scorecard metadata and can be opened from directory or handoff contexts
Existing dashboard and handoff navigation continue to work without regression
